welcome.heroDescription: Everything your worship team needs — song library, chord sheets, service planning, rehearsal scheduling, and team coordination. All in one beautifully simple platform.
welcome.featuresSubtitle: Every tool a modern worship team needs, thoughtfully designed for the way you work.

library.title: Song library
library.description: Manage your full song catalog with keys, tempo, duration, tags, and lyrics — shared across the whole band.

chords.title: Chord sheets & Nashville numbers
chords.description: Write chord charts per instrument using the Nashville Number System. Transpose any song to a new key instantly.

services.title: Services & setlists
services.description: Plan every service with ordered setlists. Assign keys, add notes, and support multiple service types.

rehearsals.title: Rehearsal scheduling
rehearsals.description: Schedule rehearsals, link them to setlists, and get push notifications so no one misses a practice.

team.title: Team coordination
team.description: Invite teammates with a 6-character code. Track RSVPs, manage roles, and keep everyone aligned.

multitracks.title: Multitracks & metronome
multitracks.description: Link stems from Dropbox or Drive and play them in-app. Built-in click track at any tempo — no audio files needed.

spotlight1.title: Your entire catalog, organized and shared
spotlight1.description: Add songs with full detail — artist, key, tempo, lyrics, tags, YouTube and Spotify links. Every band member sees the same library in real time.

bullets.a: Per-song chord sheets with Nashville Number System support
bullets.b: One-tap key transposition to any key, on any instrument
bullets.c: Tag songs by theme, search by title, filter by any field

spotlight2.title: Plan every service, start to finish
spotlight2.description: Build ordered setlists tied to real service dates. Override the key per song, add notes for the team, and support Sunday morning, evening, Wednesday, or special events.

bullets.a: Drag-and-drop song reordering within any setlist
bullets.b: Assign a key override per song without changing the library
bullets.c: Link a setlist to a rehearsal so the team arrives prepared

spotlight3.title: Stay in sync before the service
spotlight3.description: Schedule rehearsals, collect RSVPs from every team member, and send automatic push notifications — so the whole band is always on the same page.

bullets.a: One-tap RSVP: Going, Maybe, or Can't go
bullets.b: Push notifications sent automatically when a rehearsal is created
bullets.c: Link rehearsals to setlists so the team knows what to practice

howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated setup. Create a band, add your music, and start planning.

step1.title: Create your band
step1.description: Sign up and create a band in seconds. Share the 6-character invite code and your whole team is in immediately.

step2.title: Build your library
step2.description: Add songs with chord charts, keys, tempo, and notes. Use Nashville Numbers to stay key-flexible across any instrument.

step3.title: Plan & rehearse
step3.description: Build setlists for upcoming services, schedule rehearsals, collect RSVPs — then lead with confidence on Sunday.

extra1.title: Key transposition
extra1.description: Instantly transpose chord sheets to any key using the Nashville Number System.

extra2.title: Per-instrument charts
extra2.description: Create separate chord sheets for guitar, keys, bass, and more — all tied to one song.

extra3.title: Multitracks & stems
extra3.description: Link click tracks, guide vocals, or stems from Dropbox, Drive, or OneDrive.

extra4.title: Push notifications
extra4.description: Automatic push alerts when rehearsals are created, so the team never misses an update.

cta.title: Ready to lead better?
cta.description: Join worship teams already using Worship Manager to plan, practice, and lead with excellence.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Worship Manager account

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Start planning services with your team

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose which language the app is shown in.

bandRequired.welcomeDescription: Create a band to start planning services, or join an existing band with an invite code.
